name: Frontline Observer
name_jp: フロント・オブザーバー
desc: During the End Phase, if this card was Normal Summoned this turn: You can add 1 EARTH Pendulum Monster from your Deck to your hand. If this card was Normal Summoned, during the End Phase of the Summoning player's next turn: You can Tribute this card; add 1 EARTH monster from your Deck to your hand.
mnst_eff: During the End Phase, if this card was Normal Summoned this turn: You can add 1 EARTH Pendulum Monster from your Deck to your hand. If this card was Normal Summoned, during the End Phase of the Summoning player's next turn: You can Tribute this card; add 1 EARTH monster from your Deck to your hand.
eff: During the End Phase, if this card was Normal Summoned this turn: You can add 1 EARTH Pendulum Monster from your Deck to your hand. If this card was Normal Summoned, during the End Phase of the Summoning player's next turn: You can Tribute this card; add 1 EARTH monster from your Deck to your hand.

action: Activates during the turn in which it was Normal Summoned
